text.message: Y’all are just asking to lose I don’t understand
i only accepted cause oj did

Also man has 3 numbers and they are only rolling
oh come on, i have small chances comparing to black
And the game won’t ever 7 you out
As you sit all game with 12 cards
brother i have none cuz u popped them all
you at 9 points, no more trade
theres no way i win, in case you missed it i have to city
u double city or city settle long before i
or oj takes road by then
